args.body:
Summary of websites posted in the 'general' channel:
1. **www.informations.com**: The latest job report brought a mix of relief and concern as unemployment edged down to 7.2%.
2. **www.restaurant-zurich.com**: Zurich Restaurant is a cozy, alpine-inspired eatery renowned for its authentic Swiss cuisine, featuring dishes like cheese fondue and rösti, with stunning views of the city.
Hi Dora! I visited your website and found it very informative and user-friendly. I appreciate the design and the content you provide. Keep up the great work!
